title: tragia rupestris var. genuina
intro: Tragia rupestris var. genuina, also known as the rock spiderwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragia rupestris var. genuina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Tragia rupestris var. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
